headline: Global Payments to Present at Mizuho Technology Conference
summary: ATLANTA, June 05, 2026--Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) announced today that Cameron Bready, chief executive officer, will present live at the Mizuho Technology Conference.

headline: Assessing Global Payments (GPN) Valuation As Shares Track A Weak Multi Period Performance
summary: Global Payments stock snapshot and recent moves Global Payments (GPN) has been drawing attention after recent trading, with the stock closing at US$67.81 and showing declines over the past week, month, past 3 months, year to date, and past year. See our latest analysis for Global Payments. The recent 7 day share price return, down 8.3%, and year to date share price return, down 10.2%, sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return that is down 9.7%. Together, these figures point to fading...
